hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git push.*(origin )?main|git push.*(origin )?master"; then echo "BLOCKED: direct push to main/master forbidden — use a branch or railway up" >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm -rf /|rm -rf ~"; then echo "BLOCKED: destructive rm pattern" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then python -m ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; python -m ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'echo "=== Session Start ==="; echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; echo "Last commits:"; git log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null; echo "Bot status:"; railway service 2>/dev/null | head -2; exit 0'
